name: values

name: ContractFunction
desc:
An Object that represents a contract function generated from an ABI
Used for Encoding a datafield and after executing decoding the output

name: decode
desc:
Try to decode the raw data using the function and return the decoded function
If the decoding of the data with information from the function fails, an exception is thrown

name: decodeRaw
desc:
Try to decode the raw data using the abiList and return the decoded function
If the function is not found, return null

name: decodeRawWithFetch
desc:
Try to decode the raw data using the abiList
If the function is not found locally it will try to fetch the function from an external source (4byte.directory)
If the function is not found, return null
If a local function is found, return a ContractFunctionWithValues
If an external function is found, return a ExternalContractFunctionWithValues

name: ContractFunctionWithValuesAndOutputs
desc:
An Object that represents a contract function generated from an ABI
Has the List parameters with wich the function was called
Has the List outputs with the outputs of said executed function

name: ExternalContractFunction
desc:
An Object that represents a contract function where we only have the function signature
And hence only have the function name, selector and the parameters
Only used for decoding existing datafields

name: ExternalContractFunctionWithValues
desc:
An Object that represents a contract function where we only have the function signature
And hence only have the function name, selector and the parameters
Created after decoding the datafield with ExternalContractFunction

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: LocalContractFunctionMixin
desc:
A mixin for ContractFunction and ContractFunctionWithValues
Used to get the stateMutability and outputs of the function
These are only available in the local contract functions

Fetches the gasPrice and gasLimit from the network
Fetches the nonce from the network

name: buildUnsignedTransaction

Fetches the gasPrice and gasLimit from the network
Fetches the nonce from the network

name: call
desc:
Performs an RPC request, asking the server to execute the function with
the given name and the associated parameters, which need to be encodable
with the json class of dart:convert.

name: RPCError
desc: Exception thrown when an the server returns an error code to an rpc request.

name: RPCResponse
desc:
Response from the server to an rpc request. Contains the id of the request
and the corresponding result as sent by the server.

name: pops
desc: Signatures of uPoPHash for each input used in the to be proven transaction

name: proofOfPayment
desc: Proof of Payment using BIP120: https://bips.xyz/120

name: chainId
desc:
The chainId is optional for transactions with v = 27 or v = 28 (EIP-155)
For other transactions, chainId is calculated as (v - 35) / 2 for odd v
and (v - 36) / 2 for even v

desc: The hash code for this object.

name: inputMap
desc:
Mapping of UTXOs to generated inputs
Non Null if returned from buildUnsignedTransaction

name: buildDummyTxFromScratch
desc:
Creates a dummy transaction to estimate the size of the transaction and hence the fee
Also returns the chosen UTXOs so that they can be used to create the real transaction with the same UTXOs
Includes a safety margin so that changes in the Amount dont lead to a different fee

name: rebroadcastTransaction
desc:
For a given hash and serializedTx we check if the transaction is already in the mempool
If not we rebroadcast the transaction until at least half of the nodes have the transaction
